title: 016/004/018 Rerank Matrix Re-Bench
description: Final reranker verdict packet — re-benchmarks BGE-baseline, BGE+path-class, jina-reranker-v3 (and optional mxbai) under the fully-fixed 013/014/015/016/017 candidate-set pipeline. Picks production default deterministically, locks in config.py, retains losing adapters as opt-in. ADR-021 documents 4-lane numbers + closes the arc.
